title: Superseded facts remain searchable and can still outrank the replacement
description: Pins today’s Risk F behavior: add_fact reports possible_conflict, but the stale fact still coexists and remains rankable in normal search results.
contract_notes: This baseline should stay green until a future supersession-aware ranking change intentionally flips it.

assertions.name: both_versions_coexist_after_conflict_report
assertions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM memory_facts WHERE source IN ('old-npm', 'new-pnpm')
